# Website Transfer Payment Mode

This module allows to relate website payment modes to sale order payment mode.

## Installation

To install this module, you need to:

1. Just install the module

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go to Website > Configuration > Payment Acquirers
2. Select a payment acquirer
3. Select a related payment mode on 'Select Payment Mode' field

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. No special usage instructions needed.
